portfolio.title: Our Work
portfolio.subtitle: A look at the projects we've proudly delivered for our clients

items.title: Moda Online Store
items.description: Online fashion store with integrated payment system
items.fullDescription: Full e-commerce store design and development for the Moda brand with integrated payment, smart inventory management, and seamless shopping experience.
items.challenge: The previous store was slow with a low conversion rate. Users were abandoning their carts during checkout.
items.solution: Complete redesign focused on speed and UX. Implemented one-step checkout and optimized images with WebP format.

items.title: Fitness App
items.description: Fitness application with workout tracking capabilities
items.fullDescription: Mobile fitness app with workout tracking, personalized meal plans, and gamification features to boost user motivation.
items.challenge: Needed an app that works on both iOS and Android with high performance and offline data storage for workouts.
items.solution: Used React Native for cross-platform development and implemented offline sync with Firebase for uninterrupted experience.

items.title: Admin Dashboard
items.description: Advanced management panel with reporting and analytics
items.fullDescription: Advanced admin dashboard with interactive charts, real-time reporting, and multi-level user management system.
items.challenge: The previous reporting system was manual and time-consuming. Managers couldn't monitor status in real-time.
items.solution: Implemented real-time dashboard with interactive charts and automatic alert system for key performance indicators.

items.title: Noavaran Corporate Website
items.description: Corporate website with minimal and professional design
items.fullDescription: Corporate website for Noavaran with minimal design, smooth animations, and full SEO optimization for search engine visibility.
items.challenge: The old website was outdated, non-responsive, and ranked poorly in Google search results.
items.solution: Complete redesign with Mobile-first approach and technical SEO optimization including SSR, Schema markup, and Core Web Vitals.

about.storyTitle: From a simple idea to a professional team
about.storyP1: Sotoon Tech was founded with the goal of providing internationally-quality web and app design and development services. We believe every business deserves a professional digital presence.
about.storyP2: Our team, with a combination of creativity and technical knowledge, builds products that are not only beautiful but also perform exceptionally well and provide an ideal user experience.
